name: virtual-lab-experiment
description: Reproducible, agent-led machine-learning experiments for numeric tabular datasets.

interface.longDescription: Choose an LLM provider and model, create an experiment-specific scientist team, approve its structured analysis plan, compare regression models, search support-aware multi-objective candidates, and record all conversations, verified code, uncertainty, execution output, metrics, and results.
defaultPrompt: Use $run-virtual-lab-experiment with my chosen provider and model.
Create a Virtual Lab team and optimize my target parameters.
Run an offline example and record every artifact.
